description: Failed 2017 ZeroTraffic crowdsale (raised ~21 ETH vs a 20,000 ETH minimum). Permissionless 2-step: anyone calls endCrowdsale() (now past end, no owner gate) to open the Ended stage, then each contributor refund()s their own balances[] deposit. withdraw() needs raised>=min (never) -- company cannot drain. 11 contributors never claimed (per-owner amounts read from private storage slot 23; pre-ICO deposits were auto-forwarded out and correctly excluded -- entitlements reconcile to the balance).
